review_title: Quality wins
description: So far we've educated users on data protection, GDPR, and what to look for in phishing emails. Results are tangile, in both click prone rates and course completion.
author: Karl B.
pros: The software is easy to use, the managed service just makes our life easier. I've saved so much time! I can't believe the price is so low based on the quality of service we receive, too! The quality of the video content is extremely high and extremely engaging. The "little and often" method of teaching so far, seems to be far more effective than any other platform I've previously used.
cons: There are no cons really. it's cheaper and better than it's competitors.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Just get Phishing Tackle engaged - you will not regret it!
description: Overall very impressed and satisfied, Phishing Tackle has helped plug a gap in the company training and having the regular training has helped immensly when it comes to things like ISO audits, as we have readily available evidence of regular user training and engagement.
author: Rashid H.
pros: The training and tests can be made tailored according to what your complany is working on at the time, therefore maing the test much more relaistic
cons: Nothing. [sensitive content hidden] is always always a pleasure to deal with and takes the time to listen and tkae my comments on board every time
author_profession: Head of Support and Cloud Hosting

review_title: A valuable addition to your security posture
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The guided setup process made initial config easy, and being able to use AzureAD users/groups keeps administration simple. There's an amazing variety of options for the phishing emails themselves, and excellent reporting options. The training courses have also been useful in educating our users. We used the "managed service" option, which includes quarterly review/planning sessions with a knowledgeable account manager.
cons: I'm required to write at least one "con" here, so...um, the name's kind of irritating, especially at a company with several actual fishermen on staff.

review_title: Outstanding security awareness training and support
description: i was pleased to see the risk profiles of our employees dramatically improve as Phishing Tackle's SAT training appears very effective
author: James V.
pros: working with [sensitive content hidden]
cons: nothing i can think of

review_title: Great Software, Great Team, Great Pricing
author: Andrew R.
pros: This software is pretty much plug and play. We were able to purchase and set up campaigns to start testing our internal team in less than 2 days. This is by far the easiest tool I have seen for increasing a company's security posture. They also have a vast library of prebuilt phishing emails and training connect ready for us to use.
cons: There really were not any issues I have had at all with the product. It is a solid piece of product and it works flawlessly.

review_title: Feature rich, great value first SAT platform for us
description: Great product, excellent onboarding experience and ongoing support. If you're starting out in the area of Security Awareness Training I would highly recommend taking a look at Phishing Tackle.
author: Stephen N.
pros: Simple to perform the initial configuration and to get quickly up and running with your first baseline phishing campaign. Reasonable selection of media content for starting out with courses, and custom content can be added through support. We took the white-labelling solution which has given us a nice branded Security Awareness Training portal within our domain that fits with organisational branding and reinforces trust and the messaging being delivered. Support is fast and knowledgeable. Reporting available on the platform has met all our needs.
cons: The only addition I would value would be the ability to make minor changes to courses after they have started (e.g. adding additional participants if auto-enrol new users wasn't selected, changing due dates or notification options, etc). Right now the only way to do that is to recreate the course, which looses participant progress.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Phishing Tackle - a great product and really easy to use
author: Alex A.
pros: Easy to use, the "phish hook button" integrates with our M365 Tenant and pulls from our AD which was really useful. Reporting is great too. In addition, the product also secured us compliance with aspects of the NHS England DSPT!
cons: None - really pleased with the service. Initial engagement was great, all staff really friendly and no issues with on-boarding.
author_profession: Head of Digital Transformation and IG Compliance

review_title: Phishing Tackle Admin
description: I thoroughly enjoy my catch monthly meetings with [sensitive content hidden]. [sensitive content hidden] is insightful and always demonstrates a great knowledge of analytics for the previous months data. [sensitive content hidden] always offers help and support with any concerns for that month in review and provides tremendous knowledge of the product itself and updates me with anything that is relevant about courses, campaigns and new products. [sensitive content hidden] customer service at meetings is carried out with a high level of professionalism and thought that allows for great feedback in a friendly and personable way. I couldn't recommend [sensitive content hidden] enough and thank him for all his help, guidance and support since I took over the role as admin for [sensitive content hidden]
author: Richard H.
pros: All features are brilliantly impactful. From a Users point of view - the course videos are short and concise and full of key detail. The quizzes test knowledge and comprehension which is key and a great addition over the past two/three months.From an Admin point of view, the analytics features are great. The visuals and reporting are of great quality. The Managed Service and reports are great to gather an overview. The data within the courses section and campaigns gives me data to create reports myself for the company and feedback to managers and directors. Support from the LIVE Customer Chat is efficient and informative and all questions I have asked over the months have been answered in a timely and knowledgeable manner.
cons: Nothing. I'm very pleased with all aspects of the product.

review_title: Phishing Tackle is a Cybersecurity essential
description: It has been a pleasure to use since day one, and has lowered our attack surface considerably whilst pretty much running itself and delivering quality training to our staff. We're so impressed with the results that we're now planning to deploy to our associated representatives and their staff.
author: Russell P.
pros: Phishing Tackle has taken our users from being hardly aware of cybersecurity risks to a crack team of individuals that are constantly on the lookout for dodgy emails that try and bring our network down. Being a high-risk target, the software has given management and IT the confidence that we've got the front-line covered. Reporting is easy to understand and integrates seamlessly into our Azure AD environment, and the regular overview calls with [sensitive content hidden] give us a great insight into how we're performing and how we can customise the training modules to suit our needs.
cons: There were a few nuances to setting up Phishing Tackle, but these were legitimate security hurdles within the Azure environment that needed to be overcome to allow the software to do its thing. It would actually have been worrying from a security point of view if it was too easy, and we received quick and efficient help from the support team to get us up and running.

review_title: Really great product with many uses
description: Really great product, great to bundle along with other services.
author: David C.
pros: The customisation is limitless, and the user training portal has given us additional revenue streams as a training provider for bespoke customer solutions.
cons: There are sometimes weird timing issues and sometimes the emails can be easily spotted after a number of uses due to the short list of fake URL's used.

review_title: Phishing Tackle Review
description: Very good. The service is effective and support, excellent.
author: Garry L.
pros: Single-sign-on for security. Ease of use, clear dashboards reporting.
cons: There is nothing comes to mind, it really is an excellent product.

review_title: Does more than it says on the tin!
description: Professional and supportive.
author: Simon M.
pros: The simplicity and integration options. It is a very clear well structured piece of software. The support team are quick and responsive.
cons: There are no features that are difficult to use, so no.

review_title: Excellent product by excellent people
description: Really happy with the experience overall. The Phishing training sessions are short, interesting, and informative, and the Phishing test is really impressive, and gives us an insight into how our staff are performing from an Information Security viewpoint.
author: Colin B.
pros: It's really easy to use, the UI is nice, and the support from the staff is excellent.
cons: Was a little tricky to set up at first, that but was mainly down to inexperience on our part, not because of Phishing Tackle itself.

review_title: Effective Simulated Email Training and Analytics
description: The support and managed service level from their team has been excellent. They devoted significant time to working to resolve some technical issues that involved a third-party email security provider blocking simulated emails and email tracking, which we very much appreciated.
author: Bryan S.
pros: Setup and customer support teams have been excellent. The product performs well at simulated email campaigns and associated tracking of user interaction activity. Training topics are quite varied and provide coverage on many key topics.
cons: Some of the back-end navigation is a bit of a challenge to pick up, but this is mostly a function of the necessarily evils of integration with Microsoft, so I'm not sure there is much to be done here.

review_title: I'd give 10 stars if I could!!
description: To fill the gap in InfoSec training and testing of staff base with regards how prone they may be to fall victim of phishing.
author: Paul P.
pros: Very easy to use, great interactive GUI with a plethora of customisable options for campaigns, training and reports.
cons: Nothing. As above, the platform satisfies all of our business and user needs.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent, inexpensive yet essential product
description: Love the product, its an essential product now and progress in user training can be seen clearly. The price for a managed service is unbelievable and monthly account reviews are useful. Its a must-have for all internet enabled companies.
author: Ammo S.
pros: Fully Managed service for the less than the price of KnowB4 unmanaged service. Easy to use and good reporting. Less training videos than KB4 but significantly cheaper and content is being added sufficiently fast for there to be minimal repetition.
cons: Outlook plugin sometimes crashes AD user sync is not fully able to sync correctly. IE employees who have left are not deleted automatically so must be manually managed.

review_title: Effective and user-friendly simulated phishing platform
description: As an MSSP, this product ties in nicely with our portfolio and we aim to increase our use of this internally to ensure that our staff are constantly vigilant of phishing attacks.
author: Adam M.
pros: The set-up of campaigns is easy and user friendly with a reasonable wealth of templates to choose from. Reports are very detailed and provide use-able insight into click-rate trends. The ability to add more email addresses/clients without needing to procure licenses is very useful.
cons: The initial whitelisting guidance could do with recommending multiple/best practice whitelisting measures as we have had to add further measures later down the line to avoid Exchange Online Protection. I think the training course function would benefit greatly from having some quiz templates to offer guidance around what can be made with the quiz master.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Superb service from start to finish.
description: The transition to Phishing Tackle has been seamless. The service we receive from them has been a massive upgrade. Every aspect from sales right down to our monthly update meetings with [SENSITIVE CONTENT] has been a significant upgrade. The ongoing monthly meetings ensure we get the most out of the product/service. Would highly recommend.
author: Gareth G.
pros: There is nothing not to like about it, it is easy to use, intuitive. It has a comprehensive list of features, from policy management, CVE's library, right down to useful training videos for end users. Whether you manage yourself or go for the managed service its easy for any IT team to configure and manage.
cons: Not really a con as the feature is imminent, smishing will now be part of the product suite.

review_title: Outstanding security awareness and training tool
description: Phishing Tackle has helped educate our staff in IT security, the continual testing and training means employees are more conscious of IT security compared with yearly coursework.
author: Brian O.
pros: Phishing tackle has been a great addition to our IT security suite. The setup and integration was straightforward . Phishing tackle provide an excellent support portal which addresses any questions we have had. Along with outstanding account management, sales engagement and customer support, overall it has been a very positive experience and I would highly commend this company for how well they look after customers. Both the phishing simulation tests and training have worked well within our company. Keeping security awareness levels across all employees is key in any business. Continual testing and training has improved our security posture and helped our employees within their work and home lives. The automation of testing and training with little impact to IT workloads has been a real benefit to our business.
cons: This is a minor issue but we decided to issue our own training reminders as we couldn't quite get our logo's and images to not be blocked by Outlook as the image is coming from an external site, it led to our staff thinking the email was not from IT. A really minor issue.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Phishing Tackle Review
description: Phishing Tackle has been instrumental in improving the business's overall ability to identify phishing emails as well as increasing overall security awareness. The managed service approach ensures that the service is very light touch for admin staff.
author: Neal J.
pros: The service provides an excellent way on increasing security awareness for our users. The phishing campaigns really focus our staff's attention and has increased engagement significantly. The monthly security training videos are short and to the point, helping to maintain that level of engagement while delivering useful information. This is all done at a very cost effective level.
cons: I haven't seen any real downsides of the service, it does exactly what we need.

review_title: Very easy to get started and a great library of campaigns
author: Paul P.
pros: There's a good library of campaigns so you can get up and running easily. There's the alarm functionality to point out to users what warning signs to look out for and train.
cons: Getting started with GSuite wasn't as straight forward as I would have liked. Support were great, but the additional steps to make the campaigns realistic in GMail should have been made more obvious?

review_title: Really great product has had a very positive effect on the business
description: Really great, [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] has been very helpful and the product has defiantly made the business aware of threats outside of our organisation.
author: Katie D.
pros: Content Customization Service Ability to test individual departments
cons: It is only as good as the data supplied by the business so can be an issue when things go wrong.

review_title: Phishing Tackle
author: Alina E.
pros: It is very easy to use, quick training modules, brilliant reports, great customer support
cons: I like everything about it, nothing else to add.

review_title: Customer service second to none!
description: The level of customer support is outstanding. Queries and issues are resolved in an extremely timely manner. [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] and the team are a real pleasure to partner with and nothing is too much trouble!
author: Gemma C.
pros: The bitesize training videos make the content manageable and help with learner engagement and knowledge retention. The reports are really simple, useful and accessible in terms of evaluating the impact of training.
cons: Not applicable in this case - the training served its purpose.

review_title: Phishing Tackle Review
description: Overall it has been a revelation to work with the staff at Phishing Tackle, and I am very picky. The help and assistance has been nothing short of excellent. This product was recommended by a well established security company, and it has been well founded.
author: Roy W.
pros: It's clean well thought out design. Easily implemented, with good, clear and informative help documents.
cons: There isn't anything I have found yet, and I have really tried hard.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
